_comment: Distribution-repo suite: this repo ships the standard, it isn't a buildable app. project_type=docs narrows the run to the rules that fit a docs/distribution repo (build/test/service rules skip as n/a). Scored via: node check.mjs --repo .

sources_of_truth.check.mjs: The runner — single source of truth for how a rule is scored.
sources_of_truth.REFERENCE.md: Full human reference: rule table, categories, architecture diagrams.
sources_of_truth.GLOSSARY.md: Plain-language definitions of the DevOps/supply-chain terms.
